TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0) {
        int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    }
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to sort, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Sort array descending using simple selection sort to ensure robustness
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; i++) {
        int max_idx = i;
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.n; j++) {
            if (follow_case.a[j] > follow_case.a[max_idx]) {
                max_idx = j;
            }
        }
        if (max_idx != i) {
            int temp = follow_case.a[i];
            follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[max_idx];
            follow_case.a[max_idx] = temp;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
